# Rangework

The authoritative conventions for this repository live in `AGENTS.md` at the repo root. Read that file for the complete build/test/lint commands, secrets policy, module map, and routing table.

The routing table in `AGENTS.md` points to area-specific detail files in `.agents/instructions/`. Read the relevant detail file before working in any module.

The `.github/instructions/*.instructions.md` files below are loaded automatically by Copilot for matching file paths — each one redirects to the canonical file in `.agents/instructions/`.
